title: Events
content: Events Report On Community Engagement Service Under NEP 2020: 05 June 2026 Complete Report NEP 5th Anniversary - 29th July 2025 Report on UGC - Malaviya Mission Teacher Training Centre, Himachal Pradesh University, Shimla, HP, NEP-2020: Orientation & Sensitization Programme :22nd April - 30th April 2025 Report on NEP Talk Delivered by Prof Sachidananda Mohanty Orientation Seminar Conducted on National Education Day - 2020 on 11th April, 2025 Report of the Event organized on 11th Nov 2024 on NEP for National Education Day Report on In-class General Awareness Sessions on NEP-2020 for B.Tech. 1st Year Freshers Batch: 31st July, 2024 Workshop cum seminar on reforms in secondary and higher education post NEP organized for various school principals of H.P, Punjab, and Haryana on April 13, 2024 JUIT Particiaption Report in MMTTC (3rd Program) 26th Feb to 5 March 2024 JUIT Faculty Participation Report (MMTTC Programme 2) 12th Feb - 20th Feb 2024 JUIT Participation in MMTTC Programme Report 1. FDP on "NEP 2020 Implementation in Higher Education Institutes" from May 9-13, 2022 organized by the Department of Curriculum Development Centre, National Institute of Technical Teachers Training and Research (NITTTR) Chandigarh.
